Quality and Accreditation

MUDEK Accreditation

MENU

Our Electrical and Electronics Engineering and Civil Engineering undergraduate programmes at the Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences are accredited by the Association for the Evaluation and Accreditation of Engineering Undergraduate Programmes (MÜDEK). MÜDEK is a full member of the European Network for Accreditation of Engineering Education (ENAEE) and a full member of the Washington Accord, a multilateral accreditation recognition agreement under the umbrella of the International Engineering Alliance (IEA). Thanks to MÜDEK accreditation, our undergraduate programmes have been awarded the EUR-ACE Bachelor Label.

Our Civil Engineering undergraduate programme at the Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences has been accredited by the Association for the Evaluation and Accreditation of Engineering Undergraduate Programmes (MÜDEK) as of 01 May 2022 and until 30 September 2027 for the maximum period granted at one time. Our Electrical and Electronics Engineering undergraduate programme has been accredited by MÜDEK as of 30 September 2024 and until 30 September 2027.

You can access the relevant certificates from the links below.
